title: The Essence of Shinji
wikitext:
[]: The Essence of Shinji             Quote Post by arkiel » Thu Mar 14, 2013 1:05 pm http://www.japanator.com/evangelion-body-spray-is-the-essence-of-shinji-28220.phtml So, what's this thing gonna smell like? Rice vinegar and lemony cleaning products and blood and rage and despair?

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Mar 14, 2013 3:34 pm My money's on fear sweat, semen and pine sol. Asuka's will smell like cherries, napalm and a hint of lavender. Rei's will be blood, buttermilk and anticeptic.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Thu Mar 14, 2013 4:21 pm NemZ wrote: My money's on fear sweat, semen and pine sol.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Thu Mar 14, 2013 6:19 pm It's probably going to smell like vaginal juices.

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Thu Mar 14, 2013 6:26 pm My vote is on tears. The saltiest around.

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Thu Mar 14, 2013 6:28 pm tears and urine

[]:             Quote Post by Dream » Thu Mar 14, 2013 6:45 pm ... Is it wrong that i actually want to buy it? Also, as far as i understand it, it isn't actually called "The essence of Shinji"

[]:             Quote Post by nervshatter » Thu Mar 14, 2013 6:48 pm Yeah i'm gonna stick with AXE I mean who wants to smell of depression, anger, and failure.

[]:             Quote Post by Blue Monday » Thu Mar 14, 2013 6:50 pm That illustration looks like it's lifted straight from the pages of ISRP.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Thu Mar 14, 2013 7:10 pm Why are they so eager to cover him with their own juices?

[]:             Quote Post by arkiel » Thu Mar 14, 2013 7:11 pm Rei Ayanami's would have no scent whatsoever. It would be called "Unnecessary." Asuka's would have an active ingredient that gives you syphilis, forcing you to mirror her behavior and attitude. Gendo already has a scent, advertised here: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AdNOWSmrQ6o

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Thu Mar 14, 2013 7:23 pm TMBounty_Hunter wrote: Why are they so eager to cover him with their own juices?

[]:             Quote Post by Dream » Thu Mar 14, 2013 7:32 pm CJD wrote: I've been trying to figure that out every day since I watched Eva for the first time.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Thu Mar 14, 2013 7:33 pm Dream wrote: He's Gendo's son.

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Thu Mar 14, 2013 8:07 pm CJD wrote: I've been trying to figure that out every day since I watched Eva for the first time.

[]:             Quote Post by Dream » Thu Mar 14, 2013 8:19 pm riffraff11235 wrote: I've always chalked it up to Main Character Syndrome, at least in part.

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Thu Mar 14, 2013 8:39 pm Dream wrote: Also, the fact that the girls aren't actually eager to cover him with their juices. At least not all of a sudden/without any reason.

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Thu Mar 14, 2013 8:54 pm first thoughts on hearing about this product KnightmareX13 wrote: scent of male anus

[]:             Quote Post by nervshatter » Thu Mar 14, 2013 9:06 pm Misato's essence would smell of sex and booze.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Thu Mar 14, 2013 9:14 pm nervshatter wrote: Misato's essence would smell of sex and booze.
